query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN proyectoId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_proyecto, SUM(CASE WHEN titulo LIKE 'Test%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as test_items FROM items;
